detect.predict.instructions: Evaluate the supplied passage and determine whether it is more likely to have been generated by an AI or written by a human. Base the decision on the overall pattern of evidence—such as formulaic phrasing, repetitive structure, generic or overly polished language, unusual consistency, specificity, natural variation, and contextual coherence—rather than any single cue. Make the best binary classification even when uncertain. Output exactly one label: `AI-generated` or `Human-written`.
